name: Wheaton Precious Metals Corp.
description: Wheaton Precious Metals Corp. is one of the world's largest precious metals streaming companies, headquartered in Vancouver, Canada. The company enters into streaming agreements to purchase all or a portion of the precious metals or cobalt production from high-quality mines at a predetermined price. By providing upfront capital to miners, Wheaton secures long-term delivery of gold, silver, palladium, and cobalt. This business model offers investors leverage to commodity prices and operational growth while mitigating many of the risks typically associated with traditional mining companies.
